zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Gruffudd於大約1270年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾格林塔維時，他的父親Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr74歲，母親Jane Fleming51歲。他和Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd至少有1個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Gruffudd was born about 1270, in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr, was 74 and his mother, Jane Fleming, was 51. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Gruffudd est né environ 1270, à Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Jane Fleming, avait 51 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Gruffudd um 1270 in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr 74 und seine Mutter Jane Fleming 51. Er hatte mit Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1270 nel Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr, aveva 74 anni e il suo madre, Jane Fleming, aveva 51 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Gruffuddが約1270年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアグリンタウで生まれた時，父Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyrは74歳，母Jane Flemingは51歳であった。彼はMrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffuddとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1270년 웨일스 브레콘실르 그린타w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr(은)는 74세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Fleming(은)는 51세였다. 그는 Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Gruffudd родился около 1270 г. в местности глинтав, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Fleming, 51. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1270, en Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Griffith Ap Griffith Gwyr, tenía 74 años y su mamá, Jane Fleming, tenía 51 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Hywel ap Dafydd ap Gruffudd.
